key_personnel.name: Marcus Webb
key_personnel.budget_tier_experience: Largest prior: $8M (Neon Drift). The Deep Horizon at $7.26M is in-tier on budget but ahead of his complexity record.
key_personnel.notes: Two completed features, both profitable but small scale. Never managed a VFX-heavy production. No underwater filming experience.

key_personnel.name: Jordan Chen
key_personnel.notes: Nicholl Fellowship semi-finalist 2023. Screenwriting competition winner. No produced credits prior to this project.

key_personnel.name: Lisa Park
key_personnel.genre_experience: Action — no sci-fi, no VFX-heavy projects
key_personnel.budget_tier_experience: Largest prior: $8M (Neon Drift, same project as director)
key_personnel.notes: Has worked with director Marcus Webb before. Strong director-producer chemistry. Never managed VFX-heavy production. Never managed underwater unit.

key_personnel.name: David Okafor
notable_credits: Various — primarily financing role across 5 projects 2020-2025
key_personnel.notes: New to creative film producing. Background in real estate investment. Brings capital, not production expertise.
